title: Account Lockout After 3 Consecutive Failed PIN Attempts
description: The system shall lock the user's account after three consecutive failed PIN attempts.
rationale: To protect the user's financial information from unauthorized access through repeated incorrect PIN entries.
business_value: Enhances security and prevents potential fraud by preventing brute force attacks on the user's credentials.

source.description: As a user I need to authenticate using my card and PIN, and have my account locked after 3 consecutive failed attempts So that my account is protected from unauthorized access

acceptance_criteria: Given I have inserted my card
When I enter an incorrect PIN three consecutive times
postconditions: The user's account is locked after three consecutive failed PIN attempts
No further authentication attempts are allowed until the account is unlocked
functional_constraints: The system must accurately count the number of consecutive failed attempts
The lockout duration and criteria must be configurable for future adjustments
security_requirements: User authentication using card and PIN
Account lockout after three consecutive failed attempts to prevent brute force attacks

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system must handle up to 100 concurrent users without performance degradation
non_functional_requirements.availability: 99.9% uptime guarantee for the authentication process
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system must be able to scale up to accommodate increases in user base
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and provide guidance on how to proceed after lockout

edge_cases: What happens if a user attempts to authenticate using an expired card?
How does the system handle simultaneous lockout attempts from different devices?
Does the system differentiate between incorrect PIN and expired card attempts?

interfaces.name: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Interface for initiating authentication and receiving lockout status.

interfaces.name: User Data Store
interfaces.description: Stores user credentials and lockout statuses.

interfaces.name: Login Screen
interfaces.description: Where users enter their card and PIN for authentication.

test_cases.description: User enters correct PIN twice, then incorrect PIN once.
User enters correct PIN three times consecutively.
test_cases.expected_result: No action taken; account remains unlocked.

test_cases.description: User enters incorrect PIN three consecutive times.
User attempts to authenticate with an expired card.
test_cases.expected_result: Authentication fails with appropriate error message.
